goal_text:
You are looking for information in Cambridge.
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of 'boat' and should be in the 'centre'.
Make sure you get 'phone number'.
You are also looking for a 'train'. The train should go to 'cambridge' and should 'arrive by 09:30'.
The train should leave on 'tuesday' and should depart from 'kings lynn'.
Make sure you get 'travel time' and 'price'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are looking for information in Cambridge
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of boat and should be in the centre
Make sure you get phone number
You are also looking for a train. The train should go to cambridge and should arrive by 09:30
The train should leave on tuesday and should depart from kings lynn
Make sure you get travel time and price
